nasb.text: But I am very angry with the nations who are at ease; for while I was only a little angry, they furthered the disaster.”

esv.text: And I am exceedingly angry with the nations that are at ease; for while I was angry but a little, they furthered the disaster.

cnv.text: 我向那些安逸的列國大大惱怒，因為我只是稍微惱怒我的子民，他們卻加深他們的禍害。

ccb.text: 我对安逸的列国充满愤怒，因为我只是对我的子民稍微不满，列国却大肆祸害他们。’
